title: Assistant Store Manager - Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises:
Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India International Enterprises!
